name: ASEAN / Southeast Asia qualification review seed pack
change_note: Initial regional seed pack for SEA marketplace routing; country-specific official sources must be checked per case.

regulator_map.notes: Verify the exact country regulator and platform site; ASEAN-level similarity does not replace country-specific rules.

checklist_hints: Resolve the exact destination country and seller route before applying SEA platform policies.
Verify local-language label, importer/responsible person, Halal sensitivity where relevant, prohibited products, and category qualifications per country.
For cosmetics, food, supplements, electronics, and household chemicals, do not approve without country-specific official source checks.

requirements.requirement: Resolve the exact SEA destination country and verify seller route, regulator classification, local label language, and importer/responsible entity requirements.
evidence_expected: local label or responsible entity evidence
requirements.decision_effect: Cannot approve SEA regional cases from regional assumptions alone; country-specific official verification is required.
requirements.notes: Seed routing requirement for TikTok Shop, Shopee, Lazada, and similar SEA marketplace cases.

sources.title: ASEAN: Agreement on the ASEAN Harmonised Cosmetic Regulatory Scheme
sources.confirms: ASEAN cosmetic regulation is harmonised through the ASEAN Cosmetic Directive framework, while implementation still depends on member-country authorities.

sources.title: Singapore HSA: Cosmetic products
sources.confirms: Singapore requires cosmetic products to meet safety, quality, claims, ingredient, notification, and responsible-person obligations before supply.

sources.title: Malaysia NPRA: Cosmetic Notification
sources.confirms: Malaysia requires cosmetic products to be notified to NPRA before manufacture, import, supply, or sale in Malaysia.

gaps: Split into country packs for Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, Philippines, and Indonesia as usage grows.
Add current official sources and platform site policies before marking validated.
